name: Lain5G-Lab
description: Lain5G-Lab is a reproducible research environment for deploying, managing, and validating laboratory 4G LTE/EPC/IMS, 5G SA, and experimental 5G NSA scenarios. It integrates existing open-source components with configuration, orchestration, validation, run traceability, RF safeguards, and a FastAPI/React interface.

affiliation.name: National University of San Agustin of Arequipa
National University of San Agustin of Arequipa

runtimePlatform: GNU/Linux with Docker Engine and Docker Compose v2
releaseNotes: Version 1.0.0-rc.1 is an unreleased source-only release candidate. Add a publication date only after an immutable release is published.
